entries.content: OpenCode restart required after agent asset deploy. Adding or modifying `.opencode/agents/*.md` files takes effect only after `scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix` copies them to `~/.config/opencode/agents/` AND OpenCode session(s) are restarted. Agent loading is config-time only; running sessions continue using cached agent list until restart. CHANGELOG and release notes for changes that ship new bundled-global agents MUST include explicit "Restart OpenCode" instruction. Verified for removePhantomSubAgent: `adv-reviewer.md` deployed to global (7 agents total, +1) but unusable in running sessions until restart.
